nonclaims: This audit does not rebuild row-level finite-angle geometry for all 108 trees.
This audit does not promote the 18-to-108 theta-star theorem.
Root-moving transports are explicitly marked as requiring row-level re-gauge replay before theorem promotion.
Exact-free labels retaining 'candidate' are treated as proof-polishing obligations before theorem prose.
